title: Al-Ma'mun's decision to leave Marw and to travel westwards and secure al-'Iraq; the murder of his minister al-Fall b. Sahl; Ibrahim b. al-Mahdi's preparations to withstand al-Ma'mun's forces
description: Al-Ma'mun's decision to leave Marw and to travel westwards and secure al-'Iraq; the murder of his minister al-Fall b. Sahl; Ibrahim b. al-Mahdi's preparations to withstand al-Ma'mun's forces. Recorded under the year 202 AH (818 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
